title: Fletcher, Mark - Assistant Government Whip, the Cabinet Office and the Department for Energy and Net Zero
body: "Mr Fletcher left his role as Assistant Government Whip in July 2024.  Director of External Affairs, Feedback Medical  The Chair of ACOBA wrote to Mr Fletcher about his failure to seek advice in relation to joining Feedback Medical Read the correspondence here. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  ACOBA wrote to the Cabinet Office reporting a breach of the Rules. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here. "
